Linkers keep the core pure from the effect of the d-slime.

Hmm, it's a bit of a mix of both, honestly. Which I know isn't helpful, but lemme explain
So. For most things? You can use any kind of team you want, Realm-wise.
But there are a few specific things (D-Tide which you have a bit before you even unlock, and Realm Fissures which you will unlock sooner) that want you to have multiple teams.
I'd say you should get at least 2 people of every non-Chaos Realm, and then you can try for dupes or Wheels, but even then you will be rewarded for having a copy of everyone
So, in short - in the long run, go for dupes. But, since you're very new and will have tons of free rolls thrown at you? Spread out and get options.
